channel.title: Coding on AI 极客前沿
channel.description: Recent content in Coding on AI 极客前沿

item.title: Max Woolf's AI Agent Coding Journey: Achieving 100x Performance Gains
item.description:
Max Woolf’s AI Agent Coding Journey: Achieving 100x Performance Gains

In a remarkable demonstration of AI’s potential for self-improvement, Max Woolf (@minimaxir), Senior Data Scientist at BuzzFeed, recently showcased how simple iterative prompting can lead to extraordinary performance gains in AI-generated code.

The Experiment

Woolf presented Claude 3.5 with a classic programming challenge: write Python code that finds the difference between the maximum and minimum values of the sum of numbers equal to 30 among one million random numbers.
